title: Class picker panel appearing after selection
capture_instructions: Yellow points are visible in the 3D viewport. The class picker panel has appeared — it shows a search text field at the top and a scrollable list of classification class names with their codes (e.g., '2 — Roads', '3 — Sidewalks', etc.). The list should be fully unfiltered (empty search field) so all classes are visible. The panel may appear as a floating overlay near the selection or as a side panel.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, selection made (yellow points), class picker open with full class list

annotations.label: Search field — type to filter class list
Arrow keys to navigate the list
